title: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Jodie Gosling MP
meta_description: Contact Jodie Gosling MP for Nuneaton residents via email or in-person by appointment. Find ways to connect and stay updated on local and parliamentary news.
text_excerpt: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Jodie Gosling MP 0 Skip to Content Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Contact me Please see below the methods of getting in touch with Jodie if you are a Nuneaton resident. The best way to get in touch is via email. If you are not sure which constituency you live in, you can use parliament's Find my MP tool . Jodie’s constituency office in Nuneaton is based in the Town Hall. For security reasons, meetings here are by appointment only. Correspondence address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 024 7510 5471 By submitting this form you consent to being contacted by Jodie Gosling MP. You can opt out at any time by emailing me at the address above. Click the link to view our Privacy Policy . Jodie Gosling MP Follow Jodie Address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 02 4 7510 5471 Follow Jodie Links Updates FAQs Contact Privacy Policy
